name: Boldon James
message: Data classification that keeps you secure, compliant, and in control. Data is everywhere and protecting it is becoming more difficult than ever. Fortra’s Data Classification enables you to establish a policy-driven foundation that helps you identify and classify sensitive data at creation, in motion, or at rest and apply the right security policy to protect it.   We have 500 gb of company data in our hands. We have in our hands the source codes of their programs supplied to protect government files.
